site.title: Blue Cinis - Your Online Art Space
site.description: Discover and buy unique artworks from regional and international artists.
cookie.banner: This site uses strictly necessary cookies and, with your consent, audience measurement tools (Plausible/Umami). You can accept or decline analytics cookies.

home.featured.subtitle: An evolving line-up of works handpicked every week by the Blue Cinis curators.
home.featured.helper: Limited-time showcase. Works featured here are offered first to subscribed collectors.

home.features.item_support.description: Our passionate advisors guide you in your artistic choices.
home.testimonials.title: An experience that leaves a mark
home.testimonials.subtitle: Collectors, artists and partners share their trust in Blue Cinis.

preloader.skip.hint: Skip the intro as soon as the page is ready. We'll remember this preference for future visits.
artists.sort.label: Sort by
artwork.variant_selector.label: Variant
cart.selection.local_notice: This selection only lives in your browser for roughly 15 minutes per artwork. Nothing is locked on our side until checkout is completed.
cart.selection.multi_notice: Add several pieces, compare them, then pick the one you want to pay for on the right.
cart.selection.banner_notice: Selections stay local to this device. We’ll notify you if a piece sells while you’re comparing it.
cart.selection.banner_subtitle: Finish checkout to get a firm reservation with insurance and a digital certificate.
cart.page.title: Selection
cart.page.description: Compare favourites, adjust quantities, then pay to officially secure the piece.
cart.page.empty.title: Your selection is empty.
cart.page.empty.subtitle: Add artworks from the gallery to start comparing them.
cart.page.banner.suffix: This piece only lives in your local selection until checkout.
cart.page.details.title: Selected artwork
cart.page.error_generic: We can’t finalise the selection right now. Please try again.
cart.page.checkout_hint: Each payment only covers the highlighted artwork. Repeat the flow for other pieces in your selection.
